assumptions: Scope: 4 fixes only. Do NOT include auto-register veto changes (already in Feature A), embedding concern IDs (Feature C), or rename of repair_X_checkpoint (skipped).
Char budgets: default --max-artifact-chars 40000, --max-context-chars 50000, --max-total-chars 200000. Current defaults are lower and cause partial-coverage retries on normal-sized specs.

--validation-only: on checkpoint command. When set, skips adversarial review dispatch entirely and only re-verifies the manifest against the current artifact SHA. Lets post-cap edits re-seal the manifest without burning agent calls.

Restatement judge hardening: tighten the 'diminishing returns' rule so a bad-faith operator can't game it by filing HIGH findings early and downgrading later. Prompt update: require the judge to quote specific reasoning text from each prior round when citing severity drop, not just count severity transitions.

Discover CLI: change --non-goal and --acceptance-criteria to APPEND semantics when provided multiple times in one invocation. Current behavior silently keeps only the last value. Add a --clear-non-goals / --clear-acceptance-criteria flag for destructive cases.
All 183 existing runner tests must pass. Target ~200 after this feature.
Codex implements slices after spec/plan/tasks checkpoints healthy. Claude is orchestrator only.
discovery.summary: Feature B = FF Quality of Life. Four runner polish items that don't fit Feature A (safety net) or Feature C (concern IDs): (1) raise default char budgets to reduce retry churn, (2) add --validation-only flag to let operators re-checkpoint past the 3-round cap without triggering adversarial reviews, (3) harden restatement judge prompt against severity-noise gaming, (4) fix discover CLI flag-overwrite footgun (multiple --non-goal flags in one invocation silently drop all but the last).
non_goals: Structured JSON reviewer output (Risk R7 — larger project).
Completeness judge veto (Feature A — shipped in PR #749).
Review intermediate GC (Feature A — shipped in PR #749).
Rename repair_X_checkpoint (skipped — cosmetic, wide blast radius).
--force-advance CLI (subsumed by --override-judges + concern-lifecycle CLI from PR #744).
acceptance_criteria: discover --clear-non-goals replaces the list with empty; same for --clear-acceptance-criteria.

checkpoint --validation-only --stage X re-seals the manifest against current artifact SHA without dispatching any Codex or Gemini calls; exits 0 when SHA matches, exits 2 with a clear error when it doesn't.
Restatement judge prompt includes concrete quote-a-prior-round-finding requirement when citing severity drop; existing first-round-proceed-with-annotation rule preserved.
discover --non-goal X --non-goal Y --non-goal Z in one invocation stores all 3 values in state.non_goals[] (append semantics).
discover --acceptance-criteria X --acceptance-criteria Y in one invocation stores both values in state.acceptance_criteria[].
